protein_name: May play an important role in controlling cell growth and proliferation through the selective translation of particular classes of mRNA. Belongs to the eukaryotic ribosomal protein eS6 family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cell body; cytoplasm; cytoplasmic ribonucleoprotein granule; cytosol; cytosolic ribosome; cytosolic small ribosomal subunit; dendrite; endoplasmic reticulum; GABA-ergic synapse; nucleolus; nucleoplasm; nucleus; presynapse; ribonucleoprotein complex; ribosome; small ribosomal subunit; small-subunit processome
raw_fields.Molecular Function: mRNA binding; protein binding; protein kinase binding; structural constituent of ribosome
raw_fields.Biological Process: cellular response to ethanol; cytoplasmic translation; glucose homeostasis; negative regulation of bicellular tight junction assembly; positive regulation of apoptotic process; positive regulation of cell population proliferation; response to insulin; ribosomal small subunit assembly; ribosomal small subunit biogenesis; rRNA processing; TOR signaling; translation
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: 40S ribosomal protein S6; Phosphoprotein NP33; ribosomal protein S6; RPS6; RS6; S6; S6 ribosomal protein; Small ribosomal subunit protein eS6
